headline: Wells Fargo Initiates Coverage On Hasbro with Equal-Weight Rating, Announces Price Target of $98
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Anthony Bonadio   initiates coverage on Hasbro (NASDAQ:HAS) with a Equal-Weight rating and announces Price Target of $98.
